understanding.goal_understanding: The goal is to reach the goal gem tile marked '+' by navigating the grid, avoiding spikes, and using clicks to remove breakable blocks to open paths downward (or upward if gravity reversed) until the player can fall onto the goal.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement is horizontal (MOVE_LEFT/RIGHT) and after each move the player falls in the current gravity direction (downward in this episode) until landing on a solid tile or hitting a hazard. CLICK interacts with clickable tiles to remove breakable blocks ('x') at a specified position, without moving the player. UNDO reverts the previous action. Spikes cause immediate failure. Each level provides 50 turns and the episode ended after running out of turns in this attempt.
